statement: 据 AI Index 报告，美国拥有最多的 AI 数据中心，但其多数芯片由单一台湾代工厂制造。
source_text: Takeaway number three on the AI Index report was that The United States hosts the most AI data centers, but the majority of their chips are fabricated by a single Taiwanese foundry.

statement: AI Index 报告称美国所有 AI 芯片都由一家台湾代工厂制造。
source_text: Takeaway number three on the AI Index report was that The United States hosts the most AI data centers, but the majority of their chips are fabricated by a single Taiwanese foundry.

statement: 约 90% 的企业在安全上尚未为自主智能体在其环境中运行做好准备。
source_text: I am part of one of those organizations thats in the 90% of enterprises that are not ready security wise for autonomous agents operating in my environment.

statement: 100% 的企业都未在安全上为自主智能体运行做好准备。
source_text: I am part of one of those organizations thats in the 90% of enterprises that are not ready security wise for autonomous agents operating in my environment.

statement: 过去一年迁往美国的 AI 研究者与开发者数量下降了约 80%。
source_text: So apparently, theres been an 80% decline just in the last year in terms of the number of AI researchers and developers moving to The US.
